steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Origin Request Policy · Theory Origin Request Policy
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 7802 during a AWS SDK v3 dependency canary. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to align typed cache identity, origin forwarding, TTL, and release freshness; bound bytes, time, attempts, promises, streams, concurrency, cache, and spend; then double concurrent Upload instances and preserve aggregate memory and worker budgets. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

steps.instruction:
